phase3_findings.description: docs/cloud-setup.md:198-202 primary-App fail-loud paragraph still names 'the read-only review run' under the DEVFLOW_APP_ID remedy; after #300 the review run gates solely on DEVFLOW_REVIEWER_APP_ID, so the operator remedy (unset DEVFLOW_APP_ID) is wrong for that site
docs/cloud-setup.md:207 motivating sentence uses present tense ('runs under the same identity') that reads as current-state though it describes the pre-fix problem

shadow.note: Full-coverage code/test audit across shadow-1 (5 agents) + shadow-2 (3 agents incl. code-reviewer) returned zero code/test findings; iter-3 delta was cloud-setup.md prose only, reviewed by a bounded blinded doc-accuracy sweep confirming BOTH docs fully reconciled with no remaining primary-app attribution of the review path. Park/over-grade calibration gate clean: the only parked items were the two iter-1 Suggestions, both applied. reviewed_sha == HEAD (post-shadow edit gate satisfied via bounded delta-review of the docs-only iter-3 delta).
